security_deposit.allowed_deductions_rule: - Permissible deductions: Unpaid rent, damage beyond normal wear and tear, other amounts owed under the lease.
security_deposit.deposit_storage_segregation_rule: - Separate account: Landlord must either (1) deposit in a federally insured financial institution in Indiana, or (2) post a surety bond.
security_deposit.special_rules_local_overrides_note: Local ordinances and special housing programs can add stricter rules.

eviction.nonpayment_notice_type: - Nonpayment of rent notice: 10 days written notice required before filing eviction. If tenant pays all rent due within 10 days, tenancy is reinstated.
eviction.lease_violation_notice_type: - Lease violation: Landlord may provide notice specifying the violation and giving tenant 10-30 days to cure, depending on lease terms.
eviction.holdover_notice_type: - Month-to-month termination: 30 days written notice required.
eviction.court_process_summary_rule: - Court process: Landlord files in small claims court (up to $6,000) or circuit/superior court; summons issued; hearing scheduled.
eviction.filing_court_rule: - Court process: Landlord files in small claims court (up to $6,000) or circuit/superior court; summons issued; hearing scheduled.

landlord_entry.allowed_entry_reasons_rule: - Entry for repairs: Landlord may enter to make repairs or provide services. - Entry to show: Landlord may enter to show the premises to prospective tenants, buyers, or lenders.
landlord_entry.entry_time_window_rule: - Entry times: Should be at reasonable times during normal business hours.
landlord_entry.penalty_for_illegal_entry_rule: Varies — confirm remedies (injunction, damages, attorney fees) under state law.

rent_increase.fixed_term_increase_allowed_rule: - Fixed-term leases: Rent cannot be increased during the lease term unless the lease provides otherwise.
rent_increase.month_to_month_increase_allowed_rule: - Rent increases: No statutory limit on amount or frequency for month-to-month tenancies.
rent_increase.delivery_method_rule: - Notice required: For month-to-month tenancies, at least 30 days advance written notice of a rent increase.
rent_increase.retaliation_protection_note: Retaliation protections may limit rent increases after protected tenant complaints; confirm local/state rules.

habitability.landlord_repair_duty_rule: - Landlord's duty: Comply with housing codes; make repairs; keep premises safe and sanitary; provide functioning heating, plumbing, electrical; supply hot water.
habitability.tenant_termination_for_unrepaired_condit: 5. Termination: In extreme cases of uninhabitability, tenant may terminate the lease.
habitability.code_enforcement_contact_rule: Varies — contact local housing/code enforcement (city/county) for inspections and official repair orders.

sources.title: Ind. Code §§ 32-31-4-1 to 32-31-4-10
